product_snapshot.name: SalesIQ
product_snapshot.description: SalesIQ is an AI-powered sales intelligence platform that automates prospect research, enriches CRM data in real time, and surfaces buying signals so reps spend more time selling and less time on admin. Designed for B2B SaaS sales teams.

value_drivers.name: Prospecting Efficiency
value_drivers.description: Automates research and list building so reps spend more time on outreach

value_drivers.name: Pipeline Velocity
value_drivers.description: Surfaces buying signals and intent data to prioritize the right accounts at the right time

value_drivers.name: Rep Productivity
value_drivers.description: Reduces CRM admin overhead — auto-logging, data enrichment, and activity capture

use_cases: Automated prospect research and company enrichment

pain_points: Sales reps spend 3+ hours per day on manual CRM data entry and activity logging
Pipeline data is stale by the time it reaches the weekly forecast call
Onboarding new reps takes 6 weeks — too much tribal knowledge, no structured playbook
CS and Sales have no shared view of account health, causing renewal surprises
customer.notes: Series B SaaS company. 40-person sales org, growing fast. CRO is the sponsor — wants to improve forecast accuracy and reduce ramp time ahead of a planned sales headcount expansion.

fields.label: Sales reps
fields.description: Total number of quota-carrying sales reps

fields.label: CRM admin hours per rep per week
fields.description: Time each rep spends on data entry, activity logging, and CRM hygiene

fields.label: Fully-loaded cost per rep hour
fields.description: OTE salary + benefits + overhead, divided by annual working hours

fields.label: Prospects manually researched per rep per week
fields.description: Number of accounts each rep individually researches before outreach

fields.label: Minutes per prospect for manual research
fields.description: Time spent on LinkedIn, company website, and news before a single outreach

fields.label: New rep ramp time
fields.description: Weeks until a new rep reaches full productivity

output_metrics.label: Annual Admin Time Recovered
output_metrics.description: Selling hours reclaimed by eliminating manual CRM data entry across the team

output_metrics.label: Annual Research Time Saved
output_metrics.description: Hours saved by automating prospect research across all reps

output_metrics.label: Total Annual Labour Savings
output_metrics.description: Combined value of admin and research time recovered at fully-loaded rep cost

calculator.rationale: Orbit's two biggest cost levers are rep time lost to CRM admin and manual prospecting research — both directly addressable by SalesIQ's automation. The ramp time field anchors the conversation around a third pain point (tribal knowledge / onboarding) that the CRO flagged. Labour savings are calculated at fully-loaded rep cost, which makes the number credible in a board-level ROI conversation.
